title: Fix finding signals in interface above class

features.name: class defined inside interface with signal references
features.description: Code should include a class defined inside an interface body, where class methods contain non-blocking assignments to interface signals
features.snippet: interface intf(input bit clk); logic sig; class cls; task t; sig <= '1; endtask; endclass; endinterface

features.name: virtual class with pure virtual tasks in interface package
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with pure virtual task declarations used within an interface scope
features.snippet: virtual class BFM; pure virtual task write(int unsigned addr, data); endclass

features.name: concrete class extending virtual class inside interface
features.description: Code should include a concrete class that extends a virtual class, defined within an interface
features.snippet: interface APB3_TB_intf(input bit PCLK); class APB3_concrete_BFM extends APB3_BFM; endclass endinterface

features.name: interface class instantiation and method call from module
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation with a nested class instance accessed from module scope
features.snippet: APB3_TB_intf apb3_intf(CLK); APB3_BFM bfm; bfm = apb3_intf.bfm; bfm.write(100, 1234);
